name: datoon
description: Smart data-to-TOON conversion mode. Convert structured JSON only when token savings are meaningful.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-convert JSON to TOON when it saves tokens.
interface.longDescription: Token-efficient structured-data mode for Codex with automatic TOON suitability and savings checks.
defaultPrompt: Use datoon mode for structured data. Convert JSON to TOON only when conversion is beneficial.
